meta.title: Research Assistant | AKT Research Foundation
meta.description: Ask questions related to the available digital archive and review the supporting sources.

header.title: Research Assistant
header.subtitle: Ask questions related to the available digital archive and review the sources used to support the answer whenever available.

chat.label: Your question
chat.placeholder: Ask a question about the digital archive...

examples: What is the subject of this issue's editorial?
What information is available about the Hejaz Railway?
Summarize the main ideas in the document.
Which sources discuss Tangier in this collection?

sources.title: Sources
sources.empty: No sources were returned for this answer.

error.title: The research assistant is temporarily unavailable.
error.unavailable: The research assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
error.noAnswer: No sufficient answer could be generated from the currently available content.
